name: Hims & Hers
philosophy: Modern wellness that intentionally rejects clinical-blue medical defaults — warm-bone canvas, sage/tan sub-brand accents, considered consumer-wellness aesthetic.

design_language.motion_signature: 180ms ease-out hover; signature 220ms soft fade-in on quiz step content; slide-up bottom-sheet on add-to-care-plan.

trademark_signals: Two sub-brand accent system — sage (Hers) and tan (Hims) flip on a single token, share everything else
Quiz/intake flows treated as the marketing moment — the funnel is the brand
Real provider photography with credentials — no stock medical imagery
Monthly price chip on every product — subscription cadence foregrounded
Pill-shape full-radius CTAs — soft, never square
ai_slop_avoided: Don't render anonymized doctor avatars — real or none
